sector_applicability: Food businesses regulators and food safety auditors
why_it_matters: Foundational Codex food hygiene document including HACCP concepts and good hygiene practices

sector_applicability: Food regulators manufacturers and labelling authorities
why_it_matters: Provides international guidance for nutrition declarations and related food labelling information

name_full: Principles for Food Import and Export Inspection and Certification
sector_applicability: Food inspection agencies and trade authorities
why_it_matters: Sets principles for official food inspection and certification systems that protect consumers and facilitate trade
key_outputs: Food import and export inspection principles

name_full: Guidelines for the Design Operation Assessment and Accreditation of Food Import and Export Inspection and Certification Systems
sector_applicability: Food control authorities and accreditation bodies
why_it_matters: Provides a framework for designing and assessing food inspection and certification systems
key_outputs: Food import and export inspection system guidelines

sector_applicability: Food additive regulators and food manufacturers
why_it_matters: Defines conditions under which food additives may be used in food products

name_full: General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed
sector_applicability: Food safety regulators laboratories and exporters
why_it_matters: Provides Codex maximum levels and principles for contaminants and natural toxins in food and feed
key_outputs: General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed

name_full: Recommended Methods of Analysis and Sampling
sector_applicability: Food laboratories regulators and standards users
why_it_matters: Collects Codex-recommended analytical and sampling methods for commodities and provisions
key_outputs: Recommended methods of analysis and sampling

why_it_matters: Official catalogue for Codex standards guidelines codes of practice and related texts
